title: Parkio Daily Briefing for May 10, 2026
teaser: Disney World supports Central Florida schools with $1.3M donation, plus celebrity teacup confessions and Disney Springs updates.

bignews.title: Disney World Invests $1.3 Million in Central Florida Education
bignews.body: Walt Disney World announced a $1.3 million investment supporting education programs across Orange, Osceola, Lake, Polk, and Seminole counties. The funding supports STEM initiatives, literacy programs, arts education, and nonprofits including Elevate Orlando and A Gift for Teaching. Disney also surprised local elementary school teachers with complimentary theme park tickets.

topstories.title: Goof Troop Surprises Central Florida Schools Ahead of Cool KIDS' SUMMER
topstories.body: Disney characters visited local elementary schools to preview Cool KIDS' SUMMER activities. Kindergarten and pre-K students enjoyed GoofyCore-themed games and activities with Goofy and the Goof Troop. Cool KIDS' SUMMER runs May 26 through September 8 at Walt Disney World.

topstories.title: Teacup Confessions Series Features Celebrity Guests on Mad Tea Party
topstories.body: Disney Parks launched a new YouTube series called Teacup Confessions featuring celebrities riding the Mad Tea Party attraction. Episodes include interviews with the Mowry siblings, Anna Cathcart, Paris Hilton, Josh Groban, and stars from Disney's Hoppers. New episodes air Tuesdays on Disney Parks YouTube.

spotlight.title: Cool KIDS' SUMMER Returns May 26
spotlight.body: The popular Cool KIDS' SUMMER event returns to Walt Disney World May 26 through September 8. Young children and families can enjoy GoofyCore activities at EPCOT and special experiences designed for kindergarten through elementary-age guests throughout the resort.

videos.title: Disney Springs 2026 | New Gideon's Cookies, Planet Hollywood & Mother's Day Gift | Walt Disney World
videos.summary: Paging Mr. Morrow explores new offerings at Disney Springs including Gideon's Bakehouse cookies and Planet Hollywood updates. The video also features Mother's Day gift ideas.
